name: Torment
author: Elin Z
bootlegger: The Huntsman gets to choose multiple times. "Each night*, choose an alive player: the Damsel, if chosen, becomes a not-in-play Townsfolk. [+the Damsel]"
Minions learn the Damsel is in play when they die. (If there is an alive Damsel in play.)
The Golem learns they are the Golem the night after their nomination.
Players who die during the day need to claim Moonchild.
